sentence: شْحَالَك الْيَوم؟ عَسَاك طَيِّب إِنْ شَاء اللَّه.
raw: شحالك اليوم؟ عساك طيب إن شاء الله.
ipa: ˈʃħaːlak alˈjoːm ʕaˈsaːk ˈtˤɑjjib ˈʔin ˈʃaːʔ ˈallah
gloss_en: How are you today? May you be well, God willing.
notes: šḥālak Emirati greeting (szreder_derrick2023); ʕasāk optative (Gulf formula; attested QADI-AE)

sentence: اَلْيَوم حَرّ وَايِد وَالرُّطُوبَة عَالْيَة فِي دُبَي.
raw: اليوم حر وايد والرطوبة عالية في دبي.
ipa: ilˈjoːm ˈħarr ˈwaːjid warruˈtˤuːba ˈʕaːlja ˈfiː ˈdubeː
gloss_en: Today it is very hot and the humidity is high in Dubai.
notes: wāyid 'very' (Emirati hallmark, szreder_derrick2023; QADI-AE); sun assimilation ar-r; geminate رّ

sentence: مَا أَبَا قَهْوَة، أَبَا چَاي بِالزَّعْفَرَان.
raw: ما أبا قهوة، أبا چاي بالزعفران.
ipa: ˈmaː ˈʔabaː ˈɡahwa ˈʔabaː ˈtʃaːj bizzaʕfaˈraːn
gloss_en: I don't want coffee, I want tea with saffron.
notes: abā 'I want' (Emirati, szreder_derrick2023); ق=/ɡ/ gahwa; چ=/tʃ/ Gulf kaf affrication (alshammari2026)

sentence: اِشْتَرَيت ثَلَاث سْمِچَات مِن السُّوق بِخَمْسِين دِرْهَم.
raw: اشتريت ثلاث سمچات من السوق بخمسين درهم.
ipa: ʔiʃtaˈreːt θaˈlaːθ smiˈtʃaːt ˈmin asˈsuːɡ bixamˈsiːn ˈdirham
gloss_en: I bought three fish from the market for fifty dirhams.
notes: smiča 'fish' with affricated k (alshammari2026: simač); interdental ث retained (szreder_derrick2023); گ=/ɡ/

sentence: هَاذَا الرَّيَّال يِدَوِّر شُغُل عِنْد الظُّهُر.
raw: هاذا الريال يدور شغل عند الظهر.
ipa: ˈhaːðaː rrajˈjaːl jiˈdawwir ˈʃuɣul ˈʕind ˈɑðˤðˤuhur
gloss_en: This man is looking for work around noon.
notes: rayyāl 'man' (Gulf, szreder_derrick2023); ذ retained in hāða; ظ=/ðˤ/ retained; geminates يّ وّ

sentence: يَلَّا رُوح جِيب الْجِهَاز مِن السَّيَّارَة.
raw: يلا روح جيب الجهاز من السيارة.
ipa: ˈjallaː ˈruːħ ˈdʒiːb aldʒiˈhaːz ˈmin assajˈjaːra
gloss_en: Come on, go get the device from the car.
notes: Gulf imperatives ruh/jib; ǧīm rendered per the spec's primary /dʒ/ — Emirati yodization jib→yib is the documented variant (alshammari2026)

sentence: الْجَوّ مُو زَين الْيَوم، فِيه غْبَار وَايِد.
raw: الجو مو زين اليوم، فيه غبار وايد.
ipa: alˈdʒaww ˈmuː ˈzeːn alˈjoːm ˈfiːh ˈɣbaːr ˈwaːjid
gloss_en: The weather is not good today, there is a lot of dust.
notes: mū negator (Emirati/Gulf); zēn 'good' with ay→eː monophthong; wāyid 'a lot' Emirati hallmark; ج→[dʒ] rank-1 in al-ǧaww (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: How much are the fresh dates? Thirty dirhams.
notes: bičam price question; ruṭab 'fresh dates' Gulf staple; sun-assim ar-r; interdental ث retained (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: The appointment is at four in the afternoon.
notes: aw→oː monophthong in mōʕid; ع pharyngeal; emphatic ص in ʕaṣr (szreder_derrick2023)

sentence: بَيتْنَا فِي الشَّارْجَة، إِحْنَا سِتّ عِيَال.
raw: بيتنا في الشارجة، إحنا ست عيال.
ipa: ˈbeːtnaː ˈfiː ʃˈʃaːrdʒa ˈʔiħnaː ˈsitt ʕiˈjaːl
gloss_en: Our house is in Sharjah, we are six kids.
notes: ay→eː in bēt; iḥna 'we'; ʕiyāl 'kids' Gulf; ج→[dʒ] rank-1 in Sharjah, [j] the documented variant (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Go straight then turn right.
notes: sīr sīda 'go straight' and liff 'turn' Gulf imperatives; baʕdēn ay→eː; geminate ff (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: The rice was very delicious yesterday.
notes: ʕēš 'rice/food'; laðīð interdental ð retained; wāyid intensifier (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Where is the key? I did not find it.
notes: wīn 'where'; mā negation; ḥaṣṣal 'to find/get' Gulf; geminate ṣṣ; emphatic (szreder_derrick2023); respelled وَيْن — the sukūn-gated grapheme yields the cited weːn

gloss_en: How many kids do you have?
notes: čam 'how many' with kaf→[tʃ], a completed phonemic change in Emirati (szreder_derrick2023)

sentence: لَو تِرُوح السُّوق، جِيب لِي عِيش.
raw: لو تروح السوق، جيب لي عيش.
ipa: ˈlaw tiˈruːħ asˈsuːɡ ˈdʒiːb ˈliː ˈʕeːʃ
gloss_en: If you go to the market, bring me rice.
notes: lō conditional; trūḥ; jīb imperative ج→[dʒ] rank-1 (yodized yib is the variant); ق→[ɡ] in sūg (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: I went to the mall, I bought clothes for Eid.
notes: riḥt 'I went'; hdūm 'clothes' Gulf; initial cluster; ay→eː in ištarēt (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Tomorrow I will travel to London by plane.
notes: bāčir 'tomorrow' with kaf→[tʃ] (completed change); b- future prefix; emphatic ط geminate in ṭayyāra (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Call me when you arrive.
notes: diqq 'to phone/ring' Gulf, ق→[ɡ] geminate ɡɡ; emphatic ص in tūṣal (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Peace be upon you, how are you? May God keep you.
notes: šḥālak Emirati greeting; ay→eː in ʕalēkum; yḥayyīk response formula, geminate yy (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: He who does not know the falcon grills it.
notes: Emirati proverb; ق→[ɡ] in ṣagar 'falcon'; mā negation; emphatic ṣ; sun-assim aṣ-ṣ (szreder_derrick2023)
